headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Becton Dickinson, Lowers Price Target to $180
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains Becton Dickinson (NYSE:BDX) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $190 to $180.
